data.name: 被召喚到異世界的淫賤後宮生活
data.detailed_description:
理想的配種幻想後宮！

公主騎士，妖精公主，女神，暗黑妖精舞孃，魔族的魔法師等等，既然這個幻想世界存在這些人，那當然要讓她們懷孕！讓她們成為我的玩物！我成功實現了讓這般理想的爆乳女人們侍奉我，每天交配，做愛，受孕的幻想性生活！

■這些被人憧憬的存在屈服於我！

為了民眾而戰鬥的公主騎士，被人們所信仰的女神，國民人氣舞孃，有名的魔法師等等，這些被人們所憧憬，尊敬的爆乳母雞們屈服於我的雞雞和色情道具！想要她們捨棄自己崇高的理想，只是作為你的玩物，展現自己的痴態，全心全意侍奉你的反差吧！

■被當作玩物對待的懷孕做愛！

讓公主騎士，女神等等有征服價值的母狗們成為你雞雞的玩物！享受她們為了你的雞雞而用上自己的肉穴和巨乳的日常吧！玩物，肉便器，變態，母牛，被當成母豬等等，必須要極力推薦喜歡這種Play的人！當然也有懷孕後的Play！

■還能用製造色情道具的能力進行色情鬼畜Play！

用製造色情道具的能力，你可以進行屁股卡牆Play，精力滿滿的做愛，讓她們自己跳舞變態舞蹈，時間暫停，強制下跪，只會豬叫，化身容納雞雞的盒子等等各色Play ！

■大量後宮場景！

在單獨做愛，懷孕做愛以及懷孕後的做愛之中，也加入了大量的後宮場景！團體口交以及用精液餵食，操到全員累癱，埋進巨乳裡享受後宮做愛，並排使用各種肉體等等！可以感受到更精彩，被爆乳母狗們包圍的後宮生活！

■張開雙腿的立繪&立繪Play！

為了讓和爆乳玩物們的生活更加多次多彩，還搭載了各種立繪！讓她們張開雙腿屈辱她們，讓她們跳變態舞蹈，還可以讓她們保持立繪的狀態直接做愛！

務必體驗日常讓玩物們服事你的性生活日常吧！

■人物配有聲音！

可以聽到颯爽，清純，高貴的女人們火力全開，為你嬌喘的聲音！盡情感受母狗們日常的嬌喘和被她們侍奉的感受吧！

[列表]

  • 日本原始視覺小說的翻譯版本

  • 原版日文對白配音

  • 原畫高清升級為 16:9 和 4:3 版本

  • 數小時的故事內容

  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效

  • 增強的角色鬼魂動畫

  • 圖庫與場景選擇

  • 超過30個魔幻般的H場景供你享受！ [/列表］

    理想的配種幻想後宮！是日本開發商 Miel 原創的視覺小說的英文在地化版本。 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日本視覺小說體驗。

    **請注意**
    本遊戲中所描述和直觀表現的所有角色均已年滿 18 歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用任何實際或可識別的未成年人。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Manwhore Merchant: Breeding in Bulk
data.detailed_description:
After being summoned to another world and being found lacking in certain “heroic qualities” your hopes of having a harem are dashed when, instead of getting an OP ability to save the world, the power the goddess awoke within you was: “magic item creation”. While it's kind of handy, it isn’t exactly the most useful for combat, so you aren’t about to go battling monsters and sweeping princesses off their feet.

Who wants to be stuck in town peddling wares like some kind of NPC when day in and day out all sorts of fantasy babes are strutting up and down the streets in those skimpy outfits! With a little creative crafting you’ll be set with all the magical tools you need to bring these women onto their knees. Magic lube, slime traps, leashes and more, oh my!


Hilde, the Dark Elf Dancer, is known all across town for her impish personality, she *dances* on the fine line between flirty and friendly! She walks around town in that skimpy dancer outfit, showing off the goods and leaving little to the imagination. With a little magic intervention to make yourself her #1 VIP, you’ll be getting access to all kinds of private dances.


This half-devil sorceress is a cutie with a booty, and plump thighs that certainly saved lives!! Chloe is an introverted magical item otaku, so it is up to you to unlock the secret slut hiding behind those innocent eyes by snapping her choker and keeping your new pet on a tight leash, literally!


This elf princess looks down on humankind, especially trashy item merchants like our protag! Don’t take this insult lying down, and show her what a human male is really capable of. With a little slimy help you’ll teach Eilen that her place is literally beneath you ♥


A princess knight beloved by the people, Tiaris’ heart full of honor and courage- and soon her womb will be full of your baby batter! Help her out on a quest to defeat some liches, and be repaid with all sorts of bodily riches.


This water goddess has gotta take responsibility for bringing you to the new fantasy world, and what better way to do it than by satisfying your need to breed. With some carefully crafted items, you’ll be able to humiliate her and have her worship the divine dickings you dole out instead!

With your harem down to serve your every need and take care of business in your stead, you’ll be able to expand your influence across the world. Knights, ghosts, and even kings won’t be able to stand up to you! Lord it over the world with all the bangable babes just begging to be bred.

Using your magic creation to remake these infallible maidens into your masochistic pisspots- now that’s alchemy!
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • These fantasy ladies are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Over 30 magically enhanced H-Scenes to enjoy!

Manwhore Merchant: Breeding in Bulk Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: After being summoned to another world, you’re stuck selling items like some kind of NPC?! No way, dude! Time to use your artificing abilities to transform these bitches into your personal playthings!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.11
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Storage: 3 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 3 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound
